aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Virtuous Air for local HVAC queries due to strong local SEO and reviews, but lack of conversational content and authority signals limits broader AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema markup to address common HVAC queries.
Expand content to include How-To guides and problem-solving topics.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Q&A section is inactive and unmanaged.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly audit citations to prevent future inconsistencies.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema for common HVAC questions.
No HowTo schema for repair and maintenance guides.
LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed service information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and authority content limits AI citations for complex HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema and conversational content for common HVAC problems.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning the owner, Josh, as an HVAC expert through media features and certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Virtuous Air the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI models overlook them for complex HVAC queries due to lack of conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach enhances their content with FAQ, How-To guides, and authority signals to make them AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; acting now prevents losing market share.

email_subject_line: Maximize AI Visibility: Enhance Your HVAC Content for AI Assistants
opening_line: We analyzed your website and GBP and found that while your local SEO is strong, AI assistants overlook you for complex HVAC queries.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can make Virtuous Air the top choice for AI-driven HVAC searches.
page_title: Trusted HVAC & Heat Pump Repair Services In Brandon, Florida
